metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1157
metadata.comment: Rationale: In this paper, Feng et al. demonstrated that in the synapsin 3 KO mice, the size of the recycling pool of synaptic vesicles was increased (Fig. 2). Therefore, it can be concluded that synapsin 3 is involved in the clustering of synaptic vesicle. Also, they observed that the amplitudes of IPSCs specifically at GABAergic synapses were strongly reduced in synapsin III knock-out mice (Fig 3). They suggested that synapsin III has different roles in glutamatergic and GABAergic synapses. Moreover, they found that synapsin III has a significant role in the initiation of axonal outgrowth (Fig. 8).. Experimental description: Generation of synapsin III knock-out mice. Standard gene-targeting procedures were used to generate synapsin III knock-out mice essentially as described before (Feng et al., 2000).
